coach_notes: For the Binance Accelerator Program - Backend Engineer (KYC Technology) role, Java and C++ are critical gaps since the job likely requires backend systems development in these languages. For the Applications Software Engineer and Software Engineer Intern (Fullstack) positions, missing React and TypeScript is a major weakness because these are essential for modern fullstack development. Additionally, lacking testing and documentation skills will hinder your ability to produce reliable, maintainable code expected across all three roles.

jobs.title: Software Engineer Intern (Fullstack)
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your frontend development, HTML/CSS, and Python skills match fullstack intern roles. User feedback and project experience are relevant.
jobs.gaps: May need more experience with fullstack frameworks (e.g., React, Node.js) and backend integration beyond basic skills.

jobs.title: New Grad Software Engineer (Full Stack)
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your fullstack skills (frontend, Python, HTML/CSS) and project experience align with new grad requirements. User feedback shows product sense.
jobs.gaps: Limited professional experience; may need to demonstrate ability to work in a fast-paced environment and handle production code.

jobs.title: Binance Accelerator Program - Backend Engineer (KYC Technology)
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your Python and debugging skills are relevant for backend work, and you have experience with operating systems and Linux.
jobs.gaps: No explicit backend engineering experience, especially in KYC or high-scale systems; missing skills like Java, SQL, or distributed systems.

jobs.title: Applications Software Engineer
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your Python, debugging, and object-oriented design skills align with software engineering. Ubuntu/Linux experience is a plus.
jobs.gaps: Lack of professional software engineering experience; may need more depth in application development and specific tools used by Sunlight.

jobs.title: Software Developer
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your Python, debugging, and Linux skills are applicable to software development. Project experience shows you can build software.
jobs.gaps: No specific consulting or client-facing experience; may need stronger skills in full software development lifecycle and team collaboration.
